summary.classification_method: Bounded local surface sampling around each discovered water sample; water means minecraft:water at MOTION_BLOCKING_NO_LEAVES surface. The live command generates only the local 32/64/128-block neighborhood, not the old 1024-block spread.
summary.terrain_stack_finding: The active biome source can select land biomes over water-shaped terrain; this report measures land/water coherence, not biome-pool membership.
